data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a digital signature from the site supervisor in the report. While the use case mentions that the site supervisor signs the report digitally, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this feature through API reads or persisted state checks. This lack of verification indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the digital signature functionality is operational and meets the specified requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the digital signature feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify digital signature functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check that the report includes a valid digital signature from the site supervisor.
